items.name: Archer Queen
items.description: She is fast, deadly and hard to catch. Beware of her crossbow bolts and try not to blink - you might miss her!

items.name: Archers
items.description: A pair of lightly armored ranged attackers. They'll help you take down ground and air units, but you're on your own with hair coloring advice.

items.name: Arrows
items.description: Arrows pepper a large area, damaging all enemies hit. Reduced damage to Crown Towers.

items.name: Baby Dragon
items.description: Burps fireballs from the sky that deal area damage. Baby dragons hatch cute, hungry and ready for a barbeque.

items.name: Balloon
items.description: As pretty as they are, you won't want a parade of THESE balloons showing up on the horizon. Drops powerful bombs and when shot down, crashes dealing area damage.

items.name: Bandit
items.description: The Bandit dashes to her target and delivers an extra big hit! While dashing, she can't be touched. The mask keeps her identity safe, and gives her bonus cool points!

items.name: Barbarian Barrel
items.description: It rolls over and damages anything in its path, then breaks open and out pops a Barbarian! How did he get inside?!

items.name: Barbarian Hut
items.description: Building that periodically spawns Barbarians to fight the enemy. Time to make the Barbarians!

items.name: Barbarians
items.description: A horde of melee attackers with mean mustaches and even meaner tempers.

items.name: Bats
items.description: Spawns a handful of tiny flying creatures. Think of them as sweet, purple... balls of DESTRUCTION!

items.name: Battle Healer
items.description: With each attack, she unleashes a powerful healing aura that restores Hitpoints to herself and friendly Troops. When she isn't attacking, she passively heals herself!

items.name: Battle Ram
items.description: Two Barbarians holding a big log charge at the nearest building, dealing significant damage if they connect; then they go to town with their swords!

items.name: Bomb Tower
items.description: Defensive building that houses a Bomber. Deals area damage to anything dumb enough to stand near it.

items.name: Bomber
items.description: Small, lightly protected skeleton who throws bombs. Deals area damage that can wipe out a swarm of enemies.

items.name: Bowler
items.description: This big blue dude digs the simple things in life - Dark Elixir drinks and throwing rocks. His massive boulders roll through their target, hitting everything behind for a strike!

items.name: Cannon
items.description: Defensive building. Shoots cannonballs with deadly effect, but cannot target flying troops.

items.name: Cannon Cart
items.description: A Cannon on wheels?! Bet they won't see that coming! Once you break its shield, it becomes a Cannon not on wheels.

items.name: Clone
items.description: Duplicates all friendly troops in the target area. Cloned troops are fragile, but pack the same punch as the original! Doesn't affect buildings.

items.name: Dark Prince
items.description: The Dark Prince deals area damage and lets his spiked club do the talking for him - because when he does talk, it sounds like he has a bucket on his head.

items.name: Dart Goblin
items.description: Runs fast, shoots far and chews gum. How does he blow darts with a mouthful of Double Trouble Gum? Years of didgeridoo lessons.

items.name: Earthquake
items.description: Deals Damage per second to Troops and Crown Towers. Deals huge Building Damage! Does not affect flying units (it is an EARTHquake, after all).

items.name: Electro Dragon
items.description: Spits out bolts of electricity hitting up to three targets. Suffers from middle child syndrome to boot.

items.name: Electro Giant
items.description:
He channels electricity through his Zap Pack, a unique device that stuns and damages any Troop attacking him within its range.

Don't tell him that his finger guns aren't real! He'll zap you.

items.name: Electro Spirit
items.description: Jumps on enemies, dealing Area Damage and stunning up to 9 enemy Troops. Locked in an eternal battle with Knight for the best mustache.

items.name: Electro Wizard
items.description: He lands with a "POW!", stuns nearby enemies and shoots lightning with both hands! What a show off.

items.name: Elite Barbarians
items.description: Spawns a pair of leveled up Barbarians. They're like regular Barbarians, only harder, better, faster and stronger.

items.name: Elixir Collector
items.description: You gotta spend Elixir to make Elixir! This building makes 8 Elixir over its Lifetime. Does not appear in your starting hand.

items.name: Elixir Golem
items.description: Splits into two Elixir Golemites when destroyed, which split into two sentient Blobs when defeated. Each part of the Elixir Golem gives your opponent some Elixir when destroyed!

items.name: Executioner
items.description: He throws his axe like a boomerang, striking all enemies on the way out AND back. It's a miracle he doesn't lose an arm.

items.name: Fire Spirit
items.description: The Fire Spirit is on a kamikaze mission to give you a warm hug. It'd be adorable if it wasn't on fire.

items.name: Fireball
items.description: Annnnnd... Fireball. Incinerates a small area, dealing high damage. Reduced damage to Crown Towers.

items.name: Firecracker
items.description: Shoots a firework that explodes upon impact, damaging the target and showering anything directly behind it with sparks. This is what happens when Archers get bored!

items.name: Fisherman
items.description: His Ranged Attack can pull enemies towards him, and pull himself to enemy buildings. He's also mastered the ancient art of 'Fish Slapping'.

items.name: Flying Machine
items.description: The Master Builder has sent his first contraption to the Arena! It's a fast and fun flying machine, but fragile!

items.name: Freeze
items.description: Freezes and damages enemy troops and buildings, making them unable to move or attack. Everybody chill. Reduced damage to Crown Towers.

items.name: Furnace
items.description: The Furnace spawns one Fire Spirit at a time. It also makes great brick-oven pancakes.

items.name: Giant
items.description: Slow but durable, only attacks buildings. A real one-man wrecking crew!

items.name: Giant Skeleton
items.description: The bigger the skeleton, the bigger the bomb. Carries a bomb that blows up when the Giant Skeleton dies.

items.name: Giant Snowball
items.description: It's HUGE! Once it began rolling down Frozen Peak, there was no stopping it. Enemies hit are knocked back and slowed down. Reduced damage to Crown Towers.

items.name: Goblin Barrel
items.description: Spawns three Goblins anywhere in the Arena. It's going to be a thrilling ride, boys!

items.name: Goblin Cage
items.description: When the Goblin Cage is destroyed, a Goblin Brawler is unleashed into the Arena! Goblin Brawler always skips leg day.

items.name: Goblin Drill
items.description: Building capable of burrowing underground and appearing anywhere in the Arena. Spawns Goblins one at a time until destroyed. Then spawns a few more, to make sure everything nearby has been properly stabbed.

items.name: Goblin Gang
items.description: Spawns six Goblins - three with knives, three with spears - at a discounted Elixir cost. It's like a Goblin Value Pack!

items.name: Goblin Giant
items.description: This jolly green Goblin Giant stomps towards enemy buildings. He carries two Spear Goblins everywhere he goes. It's a weird but functional arrangement.

items.name: Goblin Hut
items.description: Building that spawns Spear Goblins. Don't look inside... you don't want to see how they're made.

items.name: Goblins
items.description: Four fast, unarmored melee attackers. Small, fast, green and mean!

items.name: Golden Knight
items.description: A warrior with luxurious hair and outstanding flexibility. Demonstrates his aerobics skills on demand.

items.name: Golem
items.description: Slow but durable, only attacks buildings. When destroyed, explosively splits into two Golemites and deals area damage!

items.name: Graveyard
items.description: Surprise! It's a party. A Skeleton party, anywhere in the Arena. Yay!

items.name: Guards
items.description: Three ruthless bone brothers with shields. Knock off their shields and all that's left are three ruthless bone brothers.

items.name: Heal Spirit
items.description:
A mischievous Spirit that leaps at enemies, dealing Damage and leaving behind a powerful healing effect that restores Hitpoints to friendly Troops!

R.I.P. Heal
2017 - 2020
Alas, we hardly used ye.

items.name: Hog Rider
items.description: Fast melee troop that targets buildings and can jump over the river. He followed the echoing call of "Hog Riderrrrr" all the way through the Arena doors.

items.name: Hunter
items.description: He deals BIG damage up close - not so much at range. What he lacks in accuracy, he makes up for with his impressively bushy eyebrows.

items.name: Ice Golem
items.description: He's tough, targets buildings and explodes when destroyed, slowing nearby enemies. Made entirely out of ice... or is he?! Yes.

items.name: Ice Spirit
items.description: Spawns one lively little Ice Spirit to freeze a group of enemies. Stay frosty.

items.name: Ice Wizard
items.description: This chill caster throws ice shards that slow down enemies' movement and attack speed. Despite being freezing cold, he has a handlebar mustache that's too hot for TV.

items.name: Inferno Dragon
items.description: Shoots a focused beam of fire that increases in damage over time. Wears a helmet because flying can be dangerous.

items.name: Inferno Tower
items.description: Defensive building, roasts targets for damage that increases over time. Burns through even the biggest and toughest enemies!

items.name: Knight
items.description: A tough melee fighter. The Barbarian's handsome, cultured cousin. Rumor has it that he was knighted based on the sheer awesomeness of his mustache alone.

items.name: Lava Hound
items.description: The Lava Hound is a majestic flying beast that attacks buildings. The Lava Pups are less majestic angry babies that attack anything.

items.name: Lightning
items.description: Bolts of lightning damage and stun up to three enemy troops or buildings with the most hitpoints in the target area. Reduced damage to Crown Towers.

items.name: Lumberjack
items.description: He chops trees by day and hunts The Log by night. His bottle of Rage spills everywhere when he's defeated.

items.name: Magic Archer
items.description: Not quite a Wizard, nor an Archer - he shoots a magic arrow that passes through and damages all enemies in its path. It's not a trick, it's magic!

items.name: Mega Knight
items.description: He lands with the force of 1,000 mustaches, then jumps from one foe to the next dealing huge area damage. Stand aside!

items.name: Mega Minion
items.description: Flying, armored and powerful. What could be its weakness?! Cupcakes.

items.name: Mighty Miner
items.description:
Walk softly ... and carry a big drill!

This Champion deals increasing Damage to his target and can switch lanes to escape combat or change attack plans.

This makes him not only the mightiest, but also the sneakiest Miner in the Arena.

items.name: Miner
items.description: The Miner can burrow his way underground and appear anywhere in the Arena. It's not magic, it's a shovel. A shovel that deals reduced damage to Crown Towers.

items.name: Mini P.E.K.K.A
items.description: The Arena is a certified butterfly-free zone. No distractions for P.E.K.K.A, only destruction.

items.name: Minion Horde
items.description: Six fast, unarmored flying attackers. Three's a crowd, six is a horde!

items.name: Minions
items.description: Three fast, unarmored flying attackers. Roses are red, minions are blue, they can fly, and will crush you!

items.name: Mirror
items.description: Mirrors your last card played for +1 Elixir. Does not appear in your starting hand.

items.name: Monk
items.description:
Monk has spent many isolated years perfecting a new style of combat.

He fires off a 3-hit combo, with the last blow dealing extra Damage and pushing enemies back!

items.name: Mortar
items.description: Defensive building with a long range. Shoots big boulders that deal area damage, but cannot hit targets that get too close!

items.name: Mother Witch
items.description:
Places a curse on enemy Troops with each attack. When a cursed Troop is destroyed, it turns into a building-targeting Hog that fights alongside the Mother Witch!

She also bakes great cookies.

items.name: Musketeer
items.description: Don't be fooled by her delicately coiffed hair, the Musketeer is a mean shot with her trusty boomstick.

items.name: Night Witch
items.description: Summons Bats to do her bidding! If you get too close, she's not afraid of pitching in with her mean-looking battle staff.

items.name: P.E.K.K.A
items.description: A heavily armored, slow melee fighter. Swings from the hip, but packs a huge punch.

items.name: Phoenix
items.description:
This mystical creature will be reborn as an egg when destroyed. If it hatches, it returns to the fight! What an egg-cellent ability.

Being born again is tiring, so a hatched Phoenix will have slightly less Hitpoints and Damage (80% of its total).

items.name: Poison
items.description: Covers the area in a deadly toxin, damaging enemy troops and buildings over time. Yet somehow leaves the grass green and healthy. Go figure! Reduced damage to Crown Towers.

items.name: Prince
items.description: Don't let the little pony fool you. Once the Prince gets a running start, you WILL be trampled. Deals double damage once he gets charging.

items.name: Princess
items.description: This stunning Princess shoots flaming arrows from long range. If you're feeling warm feelings towards her, it's probably because you're on fire.

items.name: Rage
items.description: Increases troop movement and attack speed. Buildings attack faster and summon troops quicker, too. Chaaaarge!

items.name: Ram Rider
items.description: Together they charge through the Arena; snaring enemies, knocking down towers ... and chewing grass!?

items.name: Rascals
items.description: Spawns a mischievous trio of Rascals! The boy takes the lead, while the girls pelt enemies from behind... with slingshots full of Double Trouble Gum!

items.name: Rocket
items.description: Deals high damage to a small area. Looks really awesome doing it. Reduced damage to Crown Towers.

items.name: Royal Delivery
items.description:
No need to sign for this package!

Dropped from the sky, it deals Area Damage to enemy Troops before delivering a Royal Recruit.

The empty box is also handy for espionage.

items.name: Royal Ghost
items.description: He drifts invisibly through the Arena until he's startled by an enemy... then he attacks! Then he's invisible again! Zzzz.

items.name: Royal Giant
items.description: Destroying enemy buildings with his massive cannon is his job; making a raggedy blond beard look good is his passion.

items.name: Royal Hogs
items.description: The King's personal pets are loose! They love to chomp on apples and towers alike - who let the hogs out?!

items.name: Royal Recruits
items.description: Deploys a line of recruits armed with spears, shields and wooden buckets. They dream of ponies and one day wearing metal buckets.

items.name: Skeleton Army
items.description: Spawns an army of Skeletons. Meet Larry and his friends Harry, Gerry, Terry, Mary, etc.

items.name: Skeleton Barrel
items.description: It's a Skeleton party in the sky, until all the balloons pop... then it's a Skeleton party on the ground!

items.name: Skeleton Dragons
items.description: This pair of skeletal scorchers deal Area Damage and fly above the Arena. They also play a mean rib cage xylophone duet.

items.name: Skeleton King
items.description: The King of the undead himself. He sometimes feels lonely (could be due to his non flattering features) and will summon friends to join him in the battle even after death. Tough guys have feelings too!

items.name: Skeletons
items.description: Three fast, very weak melee fighters. Surround your enemies with this pile of bones!

items.name: Sparky
items.description: Sparky slowly charges up, then unloads MASSIVE area damage. Overkill isn't in her vocabulary.

items.name: Spear Goblins
items.description: Three unarmored ranged attackers. Who the heck taught these guys to throw spears!? Who thought that was a good idea?!

items.name: Terry
items.description: Terry and his trusty companion Pim Pim bring their unconventional Hog Riding skills to the Arena!

items.name: Tesla
items.description: Defensive building. Whenever it's not zapping the enemy, the power of Electrickery is best kept grounded.

items.name: The Log
items.description: A spilt bottle of Rage turned an innocent tree trunk into "The Log". Now, it seeks revenge by crushing anything in its path! Reduced damage to Crown Towers.

items.name: Three Musketeers
items.description: Trio of powerful, independent markswomen, fighting for justice and honor. Disrespecting them would not be just a mistake, it would be a cardinal sin!

items.name: Tombstone
items.description: Building that periodically spawns Skeletons to fight the enemy... and when destroyed, spawns 4 more Skeletons! Creepy!

items.name: Tornado
items.description: Drags enemy troops to its center while dealing damage over time, just like a magnet. A big, swirling, Tornado-y magnet.

items.name: Valkyrie
items.description: Tough melee fighter, deals area damage around her. Swarm or horde, no problem! She can take them all out with a few spins.

items.name: Wall Breakers
items.description: A daring duo of dangerous dive bombers. Nothing warms a Wall Breaker's cold and undead heart like blowing up buildings.

items.name: Witch
items.description: Summons Skeletons, shoots destructo beams, has glowing pink eyes that unfortunately don't shoot lasers.

items.name: Wizard
items.description: The most awesome man to ever set foot in the Arena, the Wizard will blow you away with his handsomeness... and/or fireballs.

items.name: X-Bow
items.description: Nice tower you got there. Would be a shame if this X-Bow whittled it down from this side of the Arena...

items.name: Zap
items.description: Zaps enemies, briefly stunning them and dealing damage inside a small radius. Reduced damage to Crown Towers.

items.name: Zappies
items.description: Spawns a pack of miniature Zap machines. Who controls them...? Only the Master Builder knows.
